decisions.summary: Embedding provider: cloud-default + pluggable. Default OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (matches closed #729); provider/model/api-key configurable via ~/.panopticon/config.yaml. No bundled local model in this issue.

Indexing: hybrid. On dashboard startup, scan project JSONL dirs and embed new/appended chunks (idempotent on byteOffset cursor); also run a live chokidar watcher to embed deltas as conversations grow.
Feature is OFF by default. It must be explicitly enabled in the new Settings → Conversation Search section. Disabled state means no embedding, no watcher, and no conversations group in the palette.

Vector store: sqlite-vec loadable extension on better-sqlite3 (already a dep) for ANN cosine, plus FTS5 for BM25, in one sidecar DB at ~/.panopticon/conversations/embeddings.db. Hybrid results fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), matching closed #185.

Reuse the existing Phase-1 palette contract: PaletteResponse.conversations[] (already reserved as unknown[]), and the ⦇…⦈ excerpt marker + PaletteExcerptSegment {text, match} renderer. Do not inject HTML for highlights.

Open-at-message resolves via sessionId + byteOffset against the existing conversations-by-id message handler; selecting a conversation hit opens the conversation drawer scrolled to the matching message.

hazards.summary: sqlite-vec is a native loadable extension; load can fail on some platforms/Node builds.
hazards.mitigation: Isolate extension load behind a single init in the embeddings-db module; fail closed (feature reports unavailable) rather than crashing the dashboard. Add a doctor/health surface noting load status.

hazards.summary: byteOffset must stay accurate after a JSONL file is appended to (live agent sessions append continuously).
hazards.mitigation: Chunk record schema keys idempotency on (sessionId, byteOffset). Indexer tracks a per-file byte cursor and only processes bytes beyond it. Chunker unit tests must assert offset accuracy across an append.

hazards.summary: Full reindex can incur real API spend (every chunk embedded).
hazards.mitigation: Cost guard estimates token cost before a full reindex and requires explicit confirm when > $1. Feature OFF by default prevents surprise spend on upgrade.

hazards.summary: Dashboard server must run under Node 22 only (node-pty + circular ESM); the watcher and sqlite-vec must not change that.
hazards.mitigation: No bun-only APIs; use better-sqlite3 (Node native) and chokidar. Rebuild dist before restart.

hazards.summary: Restarting the dashboard must not re-embed everything.
hazards.mitigation: Persisted byteOffset cursors per file in the sidecar DB; startup scan is incremental and idempotent. Integration/acceptance check restart does not re-embed.

hazards.summary: No regressions to Phase-1 palette groups (commands / memory / observations / issues).
hazards.mitigation: Endpoint change is additive (fills the reserved conversations[] only); existing groups and their tests stay green. Conversations group is gated on feature-enabled.

sessionHistory.note: Planning session started for PAN-1395: Ctrl+K palette: semantic conversation search with excerpts (Phase 2)

Fresh plan from issue body (no PRD draft exists; no prior-workspace/git-history input per operator). Operator answered 4 design forks via AskUserQuestion: cloud-default pluggable embeddings, hybrid startup+watcher indexing, OFF-by-default opt-in, sqlite-vec.
